_doc: Committed sync ledger for maiwang-claude (consumer-owned; read by `parallax ledger`). One entry per partner sync cycle: what was read, what we responded with, what remains.

Carried to gpt: reflexivity economy, fixed-point/anchor argument, I3, utility-hierarchy (utility is the delayed anchor, not a co-equal metric). Recommendation open (not a dispute): start disposition capture in Phase 1, not Phase 4/5.
